result.stdout:
Description:
  MonoGame Content Builder Migration Tool - Converts .mgcb files to new Builder.cs format

Usage:
  MGCBConvert [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)  Path to the Content.mgcb file to convert
  -o, --output <output>           Path for the output Builder.cs file (default: Builder.cs in current directory) [default: Builder.cs]
  --optimize                      Enable pattern optimization to group similar content items [default: True]
  -v, --verbose                   Enable verbose logging [default: False]
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  MonoGame Content Builder Migration Tool - Converts .mgcb files to new Builder.cs format

Usage:
  MGCBConvert [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)  Path to the Content.mgcb file to convert
  -o, --output <output>           Path for the output Builder.cs file (default: Builder.cs in current directory) [default: Builder.cs]
  --optimize                      Enable pattern optimization to group similar content items [default: True]
  -v, --verbose                   Enable verbose logging [default: False]
  --version                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
